title: Azure Event Hub plugin for EDA
description: An ansible-rulebook event source plugin for receiving events from an Azure Event Hub

azure_namespace.description: The azure event hub namespace which includes the host name
azure_namespace.title: Azure Namespace

azure_consumer_group.description: The name of the consumer group
azure_consumer_group.title: Azure Consumer Group

feedback.description: Should the source plugin wait for feedback before processing the next event from the Azure Event Hub.
feedback.title: Feedback

feedback_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds to wait for feedback from the rule engine before raising an exception. Only applies when feedback is enabled.
feedback_timeout.title: Feedback Timeout
